what_went_well: All core components were already implemented: TelegramBotsController, bots.html.twig, bot_form.html.twig, TelegramBotRepository, TelegramBotRegistry, TelegramApiClient
Full CRUD for bots (list, add, edit, delete) with CSRF protection
Status indicators (enabled/disabled badges) in bot list
Webhook management: set webhook, get webhook info, test connection via AJAX
Bilingual translations (EN + UK) for all UI strings
PHPStan level 8 passes with no errors
PHP CS Fixer passes with no violations
Database migration for telegram_bots table exists
what_went_wrong: btn-danger and btn-sm CSS classes were missing from admin.css — added them
improvement_suggestions: Consider adding a delete webhook action alongside set webhook
Consider adding pagination to the bot list if many bots are expected
deviations_from_spec: No deviations — all requested features (bot list, status indicators, webhook management) were already implemented or completed
